test_results.actual: Not applicable — no planning-only runs exist
test_results.rule: Planning without execution must NOT set work_status=completed

test_results.scenario: Telegram failure on successful work run
test_results.rule: Telegram failure must NOT flip work_status to failed
Dry runs must NOT set work_status=completed
Status checks without action must NOT create new lock entries

completed_requires: At least one approved work action executed OR valid no-action reason logged
lock_format_rules.partial_means: Some work done but not all steps completed
lock_format_rules.failed_means: No work could be executed (not just Telegram failure)

current_lock_snapshot.reason: GSC pulled, 15+ actions executed, reports saved, deployed
